nasb.text: That they may know that You alone, whose name is the Lord, Are the Most High over all the earth.

esv.text: that they may know that you alone, whose name is the Lord, are the Most High over all the earth.

cnv.text: 使他們知道只有你的名是耶和華， 唯有你是掌管全地的至高者。

ccb.text: 让他们知道你是耶和华， 唯有你是普天下的至高者。

csbs.text: 愿他们知道，你——名为耶和华的，唯独你 是全地之上的至高者。
